title: Dungeon Maker
description: Dungeon Maker Datapack Makes A RPG style Dungeon with many mobs and loots
body:
Dungeon Maker

Create your own custom dungeon crawling adventure with Dungeon Maker, a Minecraft datapack that generates randomized, multi-level dungeons filled with challenging enemies, traps, and treasures! Featuring a series of procedurally generated floors, each one offers unique mazes, guardians, and loot.

Features:

Randomly Generated 6-Floor Dungeon: Each time you run the

```
/function make_dungeon
```

command, a 6-floor dungeon is generated, with each floor offering a different layout and set of challenges.
Unique Guardians: Battle powerful mobs such as the Ancient Guardians (armored zombies) and other enemies, including Illusioners, Skeletons, and more!
Custom Loot: Explore each floor to discover chests filled with valuable loot, culminating in a special treasure on the final floor.
Maze-Like Structure: Every floor is carefully designed with intricate mazes, walls, and rooms, creating a true dungeon-crawling experience.
Themed Aesthetics: The dungeon uses materials like mossy cobblestone, stone bricks, and more to create an immersive atmosphere.
Automated Countdown: A 10-second countdown gives you time to prepare before you're teleported into the dungeon. How to Use:
Install the datapack in your world. Run the command


```
/function make_dungeon
```

to generate the dungeon. After the countdown, get ready for a challenging adventure! Progress through 6 randomly generated floors, each 50x50 blocks wide and 6 blocks tall.
